posts.html: 💭 I think I could give this niche a breath of fresh

❓Кстати о свежем воздухе в мире Mini Apps, и… да у меня есть прорывная идея, надеюсь только на лучшее, что получится собрать MVP за пару дней, и залить туда трафик. 

🙂Я не боюсь показывать свое лицо в видео, не боюсь злых комментариев, поэтому смогу показать как мое приложение сможет понадебится ежедневно и тысячам людей 📈

🫡Аах, так же, забыл вам кое что рассказать…

💬 Я раньше уже говорил что мне интересен видоформат блога, так как это быстрее поможет продвижении моих каналов.

Возможно завтра я поэксперементирую с форматом на YouTube, первом видео я расскажу о себе и сделаю мини-блог как проходит мой день 👀

Я еще не придумал название канала, надеюсь в протяжении дня что то придумаю💭

🧐Думаю ввести этот канал на русском языке, мой предыдущий канал @abutukhliev тоже будет на русском, просто там будет больше про моей жизни, а тут про кодинг👨‍💻 Сам по себе кодинг стал частью моей жизни, я не могу устоять и одного дня без общения с любимым Claude 🚽 Надеюсь, вам будет интересно

🤡This might sound strange, but I have an incredible idea in the Mini Apps niche.

The Mini Apps niche is currently completely flooded with clickers and cryptocurrency💸

💭 I think I could give this niche a breath of fresh air

💻 $131 was spent on architecture alone for the development of composer_ubot.

While we are refining our agent for multi-step tasks, the main problem I am facing is the ReAct description of actions -> action 💬

I can develop the agent without fear, and I still have $500 in credits, but I am afraid that Claude Code Opus 4.8 will simply devour these $500 in a couple of exercises, and I don't want to save on the Sonnet model 🙂

🧠 The only remaining question is, will I have enough money for the AI API, or will I have to delay the MVP?

🤓I've long known that the IT community in Telegram is very weak and small, but I didn't think it was this small...

Recently I started paying attention to Telegram channels, and 70% of all popular channels where subs are more than 1M publish either news or cryptocurrency, and in most cases, combine news with cryptocurrency 🧐

💡I myself am interested in starting an IT community in Telegram, this is probably a difficult task, specifically for me, as an unpopular person, but still, it's worth trying.

The main thing remains, where to pour traffic from and where? ❓

Very soon our AI Agent composer_ubot will set sail on a free voyage! Our AI agent already knows a lot and is capable of working autonomously😎 Our main task now: TAKE THE MAXIMUM POSSIBILITIES OF TELEGRAM! Our main goal🎯 To take the maximum from Telegram's capabilities for bot development, all features, all subtleties, and all functionality.

💻I am currently actively developing my autonomous AI agent. In the future 🔜 "E2B" Isolated working environment where my AI will be limited only by your imagination Integration with Composer (more than 200 types of integrations with all your work platforms) Autonomous operation and long-term task planning capabilities Flagship AI models Anthropic (Claude) Don't switch channels, it will be interesting ✨

Hello everyone 🌟 My name is imnotsheikh, and I'm not really anonymous, and you can find out almost everything about me in a couple of clicks 📝I try to quite actively update my blogs and Github despite the fact that no one is watching me right now… If you are interested, who I am, how old am I, where am I from?
